pageContext.name: Vampire Stitch Zippermouth
pageContext.description: Badness Coming On  Otherwise known as 'Experiment 626', Stitch from the eponymous Disney classic Lilo & Stitch is a mischievous monster from another planet. Originating from a Halloween special episode of Lilo & Stitch: The Series, Vampire Stitch is featured in an outfit perfect for a night on the town.   Not only does Stitch's cape provide an extra fashionable flourish, his sharp bowtie truly 'ties' the whole look together to make him one sharp-dressed vampire. Upon unzipping Stitch's Zippermouth™, you'll find a dainty pair of fangs that are as cute as they are ferocious.   Like all of our Zippermouths™, Vampire Stitch is a sculptural plush. Standing at 10' tall, he's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter how much you hug him. (Just don't let him get too close to your neck!)  Want more fun friends for Vampire Stitch to trick 'r treat with this Halloween? Maleficent Dragon Zippermouth is ready to cause some mischief.
